plugins.name: ios-comprehensive-review
plugins.description: Multi-agent comprehensive iOS/Swift code review with parallel analysis, cross-file checks, and resumable stages.

plugins.name: memory-bank
plugins.description: Living project documentation with anti-hallucination verification. Commands: init, update, system-update, add-decision.

plugins.name: multi-agent-debate
plugins.description: Structured multi-agent debate that spawns parallel LLM agents for adversarial analysis and synthesis.

plugins.name: ios-quick-review
plugins.description: Efficient multi-pass iOS/Swift code review for commits or uncommitted changes.

plugins.name: root-cause-analysis
plugins.description: Systematic root cause analysis using 5 Whys, fishbone diagrams, and structured RCA reports.

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Remove AI writing patterns from text. Priority-tiered detection, statistical texture, voice anchoring, two-pass self-audit.
